corpus_role: This corpus is not used to estimate prevalence. It is a recall / construct-validity corpus assembled from deterministic positive signals and manual-review candidates. See docs/protocols/corpus_interpretation_rules.md.
gap_note: Target of 80 cases not reached. Only 18 candidates extracted from the routine corpus. Additional risk-positive PRs would require a dedicated search (e.g. mining CVE-linked PRs, vulnerability-fix commits, or targeted GitHub search for known-risky packages).
manual_annotation_status: round1 template generated; not yet annotated
